base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_menu_uppercase_large — a ui (hud_readout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Larger menu/header font — used for 'HIGH SCORE' / 'GAME OVER' / 'CONTINUE' pause-menu headers. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Larger menu/header font — used for 'HIGH SCORE' / 'GAME OVER' / 'CONTINUE' pause-menu headers
